name: Keypad
description: Rounded keycaps pressed in a tidy grid, each cap re-inking on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { width: 84%; height: 84%; margin: 8%; border-radius: 22%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); box-shadow: inset 0 -7px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.22), inset 0 4px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.3); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
